headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Outperform on American International Gr, Raises Price Target to $98
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   maintains American International Gr (NYSE:AIG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $97 to $98.
